name: components/combobox
description: An autocomplete input that combines a text field with a dropdown list of filterable options. Provides a complete composition system with Combobox, ComboboxInput, ComboboxTrigger, ComboboxContent, ComboboxListbox, ComboboxItem, ComboboxItemLabel, ComboboxItemIndicator, ComboboxSection, ComboboxHiddenSelect, and ComboboxPortal. Supports type-ahead filtering, multi-selection, grouped sections, and full keyboard navigation. Built on Kobalte Combobox with ARIA combobox semantics.
useCases: Country or city selectors with hundreds of options and real-time search filtering
User-mention inputs in comments or messages that autocomplete from a user directory
Tag or category creation fields that allow both selection from existing and free-text entry
Product-code lookups in inventory management where typing a SKU narrows the dropdown
usage: import { Combobox, ComboboxInput, ComboboxTrigger, ComboboxContent, ComboboxListbox, ComboboxItem, ComboboxItemLabel, ComboboxItemIndicator, ComboboxSection, ComboboxHiddenSelect, ComboboxPortal } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/combobox"
